name: Feature Context Menu
description: New feature identified from task: Right click on a feature and update that specific feature

MainWindow.xaml.content:
class MainWindow
  root: DataTemplate
  Card: Border
  CardBg: SolidColorBrush
  CardBorder: SolidColorBrush
  CommitButtonPulseStoryboard: BeginStoryboard
  StatusGlow: Ellipse
  GlowStoryboard: BeginStoryboard
  QueuedGlowStoryboard: BeginStoryboard
  InitQueuedGlowStoryboard: BeginStoryboard
  PausedGlowStoryboard: BeginStoryboard
  PlanningGlowStoryboard: BeginStoryboard
  UncommittedPulseStoryboard: BeginStoryboard
  RecommendationPulseStoryboard: BeginStoryboard
  StatusDot: Ellipse
  DotPulseStoryboard: BeginStoryboard
  HistCardBg: SolidColorBrush
  HistCardBorder: SolidColorBrush
  CommitButtonPulseStoryboard: BeginStoryboard
  HistStatusGlow: Ellipse
